title: BCI Binding Promotion Criteria v1
description: Schema for artifacts that define quantitative criteria and evidence thresholds for promoting HorrorMappingConfig.BCI bindings across lifecycle tiers (lab → standard → mature).

id.description: Identifier for this promotion criteria artifact, e.g. bci-binding-promotion-criteria-default-v1.

version.description: Semantic version for this criteria set, e.g. 1.0.0.

schemaref.description: Local schema ref for CI and tooling.

appliesToSchemaVersion.description: HorrorMappingConfig.BCI schema version this criteria set applies to, e.g. HorrorMappingConfig.BCI.v1.

descriptionLong.description: Optional longform description of the promotion philosophy, for human reviewers.

tiers.description: Criteria per lifecycle tier, including thresholds and admissible evidence sources.

lab.description: Criteria for lab bindings; typically minimal and focused on structural checks.

allowedSources.description: Allowed authorship sources for lab-tier bindings.

requiredCiGates.description: List of CI gates that must pass even for lab-tier bindings.

maxIntensityTier.description: Maximum intensity policy tier a lab binding may target.

sessionUsageLimits.description: Constraints on usage of lab bindings in live or replay sessions.

allowLiveSessions.description: Whether lab bindings may be used in live sessions at all.

maxParticipantsPerCohort.description: Maximum participants per cohort that may be exposed to this binding.

requireDeadLedgerExperimentFlag.description: Whether an explicit Dead-Ledger experiment flag is required.

standard.description: Criteria to promote bindings from lab to standard and maintain them at standard tier.

promotionFromLab.description: Quantitative thresholds for lab → standard promotion.

minLiveSessions.description: Minimum count of live sessions using the lab binding under Dead-Ledger policies.

minUniqueParticipants.description: Minimum number of unique participants included across sessions.

minTotalExposureHours.description: Minimum cumulative exposure time (in hours) across all sessions.

maxAllowedIncidents.description: Maximum number of safety incidents, overrides, or policy-triggered shutdowns permitted.

requiredCiGates.description: CI gates that must pass for promotion to standard.

minDetOverloadRate.description: Maximum fraction of time in DET-defined overload states tolerated.

maxOverloadEventsPerHour.description: Upper bound on the rate of overloadFlag events per hour.

minTargetBandHitRate.description: Minimum proportion of time key entertainment metrics stay in their target bands.

evidenceSources.description: Permitted evidence artifact types for promotion, e.g. telemetry summaries or Dead-Ledger attestations.

maintenance.description: Ongoing health and rollback rules for standard bindings.

maxRegressionWindowDays.description: Size of the rolling window (days) in which regressions are evaluated.

rollbackOnIncidentCount.description: Number of safety incidents in the regression window that triggers rollback to lab.

requirePeriodicReviewDays.description: Maximum interval between human governance reviews for this binding.

mature.description: Criteria to promote bindings from standard to mature and maintain them at mature tier.

promotionFromStandard.description: Quantitative thresholds for standard → mature promotion.

minLiveSessions.description: Minimum additional live sessions beyond standard-tier requirements.

minUniqueParticipants.description: Minimum total unique participants across the full lifetime of the binding.

minTotalExposureHours.description: Minimum cumulative exposure hours at standard tier before mature promotion.

maxAllowedIncidents.description: Maximum incidents allowed over the entire evidence window for mature promotion.

requiredCiGates.description: CI gates that must pass for mature promotion; typically all gates.

telemetryEvidence.description: Stable-behavior metrics expected for mature bindings.

maxDetOverloadRate.description: Tighter bound on DET-based overload fraction than standard-tier criteria.

maxOverloadEventsPerHour.description: Tighter bound on overloadFlag event rate per hour.

minTargetBandHitRate.description: Higher minimum proportion of time key entertainment metrics stay in their target bands.

maxVarAcrossCohorts.description: Upper bound on variance of key metrics across cohorts, indicating stability.

evidenceSources.description: Evidence types required for mature promotion.

requireGovernanceApproval.description: Whether an explicit governance approval token is required for promotion.

maintenance.description: Ongoing health and rollback rules for mature bindings.

maxRegressionWindowDays.description: Rolling window (days) for mature-tier regression checks.

rollbackOnIncidentCount.description: Incident count in the regression window that triggers rollback to standard.

lockForCriticalUse.description: If true, this binding may be designated as a critical baseline that cannot be modified without a new criteria artifact.
